name: Alvida (Reprint)
effect_text: [On K.O.] If your Leader has the "Cross Guild" type, play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 or less other than [Alvida] from your hand.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
